Merc-c..personality: The Mercurius Corrosivus type is intensely reactive, violent in expression, and driven by urgency. They are more active and excitable than the typical Mercurius constitution, taking hold of situations with fierce rapidity. There is a restless, consuming quality to their nature — nothing proceeds slowly or sluggishly.
Merc-c..mental_state: The mental state is dominated by great anxiety and an inability to find rest or relief, as if constantly driven by an internal urgency. There is an insatiable quality to their needs and desires, mirroring the intense thirst that characterizes the physical picture. The mind reflects the same violent, rapidly spreading destructiveness seen in the body — thoughts and distress escalate quickly.
Merc-c..emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of intense, burning agitation that cannot be contained or soothed. There is a deep-seated anxiety bordering on desperation, particularly around survival and physical integrity. Emotions spread and intensify rapidly, much like the remedy's characteristic rapidly spreading ulcerations — nothing smolders quietly but instead flares into consuming distress.
